    Method AddRigidMesh

    AddRigidMesh(IMeshBuilder<MaterialBuilder>, NodeBuilder)

    Adds a mesh instance to the scene, attached to an animatable NodeBuilder

    Declaration
    public InstanceBuilder AddRigidMesh(IMeshBuilder<MaterialBuilder> mesh, NodeBuilder node)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    IMeshBuilder<MaterialBuilder> mesh

    The mesh to add.
    NodeBuilder node

    The node to which the mesh will be attached.
    Returns
    Type Description
    InstanceBuilder

    The instance representing this mesh-node pair.

    AddRigidMesh(IMeshBuilder<MaterialBuilder>, AffineTransform)

    Adds a mesh instance to the scene, at the given location.

    Declaration
    public InstanceBuilder AddRigidMesh(IMeshBuilder<MaterialBuilder> mesh, AffineTransform meshWorldTransform)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    IMeshBuilder<MaterialBuilder> mesh

    The mesh to add.
    AffineTransform meshWorldTransform

    The location of the mesh.
    Returns
    Type Description
    InstanceBuilder

    The instance representing this mesh.
    Remarks

    Mesh instances with a fixed transform cannot be animated, If you need morph animations, use AddRigidMesh(IMeshBuilder<MaterialBuilder>, NodeBuilder) instead.

    AddRigidMesh(IMeshBuilder<MaterialBuilder>, NodeBuilder, AffineTransform)

    Adds a mesh instance to the scene, at the given location, relative to the given node.

    Declaration
    public InstanceBuilder AddRigidMesh(IMeshBuilder<MaterialBuilder> mesh, NodeBuilder node, AffineTransform instanceTransform)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    IMeshBuilder<MaterialBuilder> mesh

    The mesh to add.
    NodeBuilder node

    The parent node.
    AffineTransform instanceTransform

    The location of the mesh.
    Returns
    Type Description
    InstanceBuilder

    The instance representing this mesh.
    Remarks

    Mesh instances with a fixed transform cannot be animated, If you need morph animations, use AddRigidMesh(IMeshBuilder<MaterialBuilder>, NodeBuilder) instead.
